fixture_name: AI_OS operator tour script fixture draft

operator_tour.welcome: Welcome to the AI_OS static dashboard prototype tour. This is fixture-only, read-only planning data.
operator_tour.dashboard_regions: The cockpit is organized into status, navigation, analytics, alerts, trading readiness, Morning Brief, assistant guide, and next safe action regions.
operator_tour.validator_status: Validator status explains PASS, WARN, FAIL, BLOCKED, REVIEW REQUIRED, READY, and INFO before trusting displayed data.
operator_tour.protected-file_warnings: Protected-file warnings show whether root governance files, DAILY_METRICS, or CHECKPOINT_INDEX are affected.
operator_tour.alert_hierarchy: Alerts prioritize FAIL and BLOCKED states before WARN, REVIEW REQUIRED, READY, and INFO.
operator_tour.daily_analytics: Daily analytics may later summarize repo size, stages, validators, errors, fixes, and progress using approved data only.
operator_tour.trading_readiness_boundary: Trading readiness remains read-only and does not enable broker execution, live trading, strategy activation, or credential access.
operator_tour.voice_guide_concept: The voice guide concept is optional, non-blocking, and text-equivalent when disabled.
operator_tour.next_safe_action: The next safe action gives the operator a precise review or verification step without applying changes.
operator_tour.checkpoint_reminder: Checkpoint only after human review. This fixture does not approve APPLY, git commit, production dashboard output, or automation.
